title: Function Composition and Inverse Function Process
description: A flowchart showing the process of composing two functions f and g, and how applying the inverse function reverses the operation back to the original input.
relationships: x is mapped to g(x) by function g
g(x) is mapped to f(g(x)) by function f
f(g(x)) is mapped back to g(x) by inverse function f⁻¹
